data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $71,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Rise 5% On Iran Ceasefire
data.description: Bitcoin has surged by 5% to surpass the $71,000 mark following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a net outflow of $159 million on Tuesday, while Ethereum ETFs saw $64.7 million in net outflows. As of now, the cryptocurrency prices stand at Bitcoin (BTC) $71,582.38, Ethereum (ETH) $2,245.54, Solana (SOL) $84.62, XRP $1.38, Dogecoin (DOGE) $0.09453, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.056092. The meme coin market capitalization surged by 4% to reach $34.7 billion within the last 24 hours. Trader Lennaert Snyder offered insights on the market. For more details, visit the original article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DEEP SEA MINERALS CORP. ESTABLISHES COOK ISLANDS SUBSIDIARY TO ADVANCE CONCESSION APPLICATION PROCESS
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Deep Sea Minerals Corp. (CSE: SEAS) (OTCQB: DSEAF) (FSE: X450) announced the creation of a new subsidiary in the Cook Islands. The company, specializing in subsea mineral exploration, aims to explore mineral opportunities in the deep ocean. This move is part of their evaluation for potential exploration rights within the Cook Islands Exclusive Economic Zone. By establishing a local subsidiary, Deep Sea Minerals seeks to facilitate interactions with the Cook Islands Seabed Minerals Authority and other key stakeholders.

data.title: PMGC Holdings Inc. [NASDAQ: ELAB] Fully Utilizes All Available in $20M Equity Financing Facility, Strengthens Cash Position and Advances Multi-Sector Acquisition Strategy
data.description: PMGC Holdings Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ELAB, has fully utilized a $20 million equity financing facility. This move has bolstered the company's cash position significantly and is expected to further its progress in multiple areas.

data.title: Rio Silver Inc. Reports: Initial Silver – Gold - Lead Recoveries of 85 %, 74 % and 77% Respectively From the Maria Norte in Central Peru
data.description: Recent testing in the historical Peruvian silver district has shown promising results. The initial tests have revealed a strong silver recovery rate, generating high-grade concentrates with low levels of arsenic. These findings were achieved using conventional flotation techniques. The results indicate a successful extraction process in the region, with significant potential for further exploration and development.

data.title: Base Carbon Provides Update on Vietnam Regulatory Framework for International Carbon Credit Transfers
data.description: Toronto-based company Base Carbon Inc. (Cboe CA: BCBN) (OTCQX: BCBNF) operating through subsidiary Base Carbon Capital Partners Corp. provided an update on its Vietnam household devices project. The Government of Vietnam announced a regulatory development impacting the project.

data.title: Rocket Lab finishes its public offering, raising $$$ in funds.
data.description: As of the latest update, there have been approximately 100,000 confirmed cases of the virus in the country, with around 10,000 of those cases resulting in hospitalization. The number of deaths related to the virus has reached approximately 1,000. In response to the increasing numbers, the government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and restrictions on large gatherings. The healthcare system is reportedly under strain due to the surge in cases, with hospitals reaching full capacity in some areas. Officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to prevent further escalation of the situation.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Granted U.S. FDA Orphan Drug Designation to REYOBIQ™ in Pediatric Malignant Gliomas
data.description: In Houston on April 8, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSTV) disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) to REYOBIQ™ (rhenium Re186 obisbemeda), a product developed by the clinical-stage pharmaceutical company. The designation applies specifically to the treatment of pediatric malignant gliomas, highlighting the Company's focus on developing targeted radiotherapeutics using advanced platform technologies for central nervous system (CNS) cancers.

data.title: SAGA Metals Engages Dias Airborne for Advanced Geophysical Survey over Entire Oxide Layering Strike Connecting Trapper and Hawkeye Zones at Radar Critical Minerals Project in Labrador
data.description: In a recent development, SAGA has enlisted Dias Airborne to conduct a cutting-edge geophysical survey over the entire oxide strike linking the Trapper and Hawkeye zones at the Radar Critical Minerals Project. This survey aims to enhance understanding of the geological features in the area and is a significant step in the project's exploration efforts. The advanced survey covers a substantial area and is expected to provide valuable insights into the mineral potential of the region. This collaboration underscores SAGA's commitment to thorough exploration and utilization of modern technology in their operations.

data.title: Blackline Safety Enters into Definitive Agreement to be Acquired by Francisco Partners for up to $850 Million
data.description: A deal has been finalized for the acquisition of Blackline Safety by Francisco Partners in Calgary, Canada. The agreement is valued at a maximum of $850 million and involves the transfer of ownership of Blackline Safety to Francisco Partners. This acquisition marks a significant development in the realm of connected safety technology and is expected to have a substantial impact on the industry.

data.title: Telia to Deploy Seamless OS Following Acquisition of Telness Operator
data.description: Telia, a telecommunications company based in Stockholm, has made history by becoming the first Mobile Network Operator (MNO) to implement the Seamless OS technology. This move comes following their acquisition of Telness, a significant development that has expanded the Business Support System/Operations Support System (BSS/OSS) platform offered by Telness Tech. This strategic decision showcases Telia's commitment to innovation and growth in the industry.

data.title: Flagship Honda Debuts Exclusive Insights on the All-New Hybrid Hatchback Evolution
data.description: Flagship Honda dealership located in San Juan, Puerto Rico, has officially disclosed detailed information and prompt access to the much-awaited 2026 Honda Civic Hatchback Hybrid. This announcement was made on April 8, 2026, highlighting the dealership's commitment to offering a cutting-edge driving experience. The dealership is now fully equipped to provide interested customers with comprehensive data about the hybrid vehicle, underscoring its remarkable features and specifications. With immediate availability, Flagship Honda aims to cater to the increasing demand for eco-friendly and innovative cars.

data.title: Virtune AB (Publ) ("Virtune") has completed the monthly rebalancing for March 2026 of its Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP
data.description: In Stockholm on April 8, 2026, Virtune AB (Publ) ("Virtune") disclosed the successful execution of the monthly rebalancing for the Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP, which is traded on Nasdaq Stockholm, Nasdaq Helsinki, and Xetra. The ISIN code for this index is SE0023260716.

data.title: Natural Diamond Council Launch Inaugural World Diamond Day Today
data.description: Today marks the official launch of World Diamond Day by the Natural Diamond Council (NDC) in London on April 8, 2026. This global initiative aims to bring together over 50 countries to showcase the authentic narratives surrounding natural diamonds. The movement is primarily focused on social media platforms and is set to engage audiences worldwide.
